ip_outcome_note: Card frame names 'Milo' and the depicted figure matches Milo's canonical character design: tall blond bowl-cut, wide-brimmed straw hat, green-and-white striped shirt with forest-green dungarees, in a Turffield-pastoral setting. Print art by take.

trivia_bullets.text: Milo is the Grass-type Gym Leader of Turffield Stadium in both Pokemon Sword and Shield, and Turffield is the first stop on Galar's official league progression — the introductory gym. [Bulbapedia: Milo, via WebSearch snippet]
Milo was born to a farmer couple in Turffield and works the family farm; in-game he can be seen wrangling stray Wooloo with the help of a herding Yamper. [Bulbapedia: Milo, via WebSearch snippet]

His battle team uses two pure-Grass Pokemon — Gossifleur and Eldegoss — and his Eldegoss enters play at Level 20, the highest level of any first-gym Leader's ace in the Pokemon series to that point. [Bulbapedia: Milo / Game8 walkthrough, via WebSearch snippet]
Regular print art by take; Full Art and Secret Rare prints in Rebel Clash feature artwork by Hitoshi Ariga. [Bulbapedia: Milo (Rebel Clash 161), via WebSearch snippet]

Regular print reprinted in Champion's Path (outside Asia); in Japan, reprinted in the Charizard VMAX Starter Set and as a Mirror Holofoil S-P promotional card. [Bulbapedia: Milo (Rebel Clash 161), via WebSearch snippet]

Oracle text: 'Discard up to 2 cards from your hand, and draw 2 cards for each card you discarded in this way.' — a hand-flip Supporter (rummage / loot) that exchanges quality for quantity; saw competitive play in single-Prize and toolbox decks across SWSH-era Standard. [pokemon.com TCG database]
No flavor text printed. [pokemon.com TCG database]
